name: dtpr
description: DTPR (Digital Trust for Places and Routines) — Claude Code plugin for describing AI systems as DTPR datachains and iterating on the DTPR taxonomy.

plugins.name: dtpr
plugins.description: Describe AI systems as DTPR datachains and brainstorm the DTPR schema itself. Ships two skills that wrap the remote DTPR MCP at api.dtpr.io/mcp.
